proposal.claim: aggregate VC message signatures: O(n) to O(1)
proposal.structural_delta: message size: VC proof shrinks from O(n) sigs to O(1) aggregate
proposal.diff:
--- a/view_change.tla
+++ b/view_change.tla
 CollectViewChangeMessages(new_leader, sender, msg) ==
-  /\ vc_messages' = [...\cup {<<sender, Sign(sender, msg)>>}]
+  /\ vc_messages' = [... AggregateSig(...)]

review.argument: same pattern as step 3, distinct signers
